name: Cats vs Zombies
author: Poki
description: Cats vs Zombies is an idle game where you are on an adventure to rescue kidnapped pets from a bunch of pesky zombies! Evolve your cats to take down stronger undead enemies, unlock adorable new breeds, and explore cool places like the beach, park, city square, and forest. Ready to scratch some zombies and save the day? How to play Cats vs Zombies? Click or tap to make the choice. Use WASD, the arrow keys, or the joystick to move. Who created Cats vs Zombies? Cats vs Zombies is created by Square Dino. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Cats vs Zombies for free? You can play Cats vs Zombies for free on Poki. Can I play Cats vs Zombies on mobile devices and desktop? Cats vs Zombies can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
